description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the alpine:3.8 Docker image. In the global before_script download tclkit-8.6.8 and tclkit-8.5.19 with wget from the specified URLs, write their SHA256 checksums to a file, verify the downloads with sha256sum -c checksum and remove the checksum file, then make both binaries executable with chmod +x tclkit*. Add a test job (default stage) that runs ./tclkit-8.6.8 tests.tcl, ./tclkit-8.5.19 tests.tcl, ./tclkit-8.6.8 hosts.tcl version, and ./tclkit-8.5.19 hosts.tcl version, and note that the pipeline defines no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
